name: Marinated Whole Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
Yield: About 9 half-pints
Procedure: Select very fresh, unopened mushrooms with caps less than 1-1/4 inch in diameter. Wash the mushrooms. Cut the stems, leaving about 1/4 inch attached to the cap. Add lemon juice and enough water to cover the mushrooms. Bring to a boil. Simmer for 5 minutes. Drain the mushrooms. In a saucepan, mix olive oil, vinegar, oregano, basil, and salt. Stir in onions and pimento until boiling. Place 1/4 garlic clove and 2-3 peppercorns into each half-pint jar. Fill jars with mushrooms and hot, well-mixed oil/vinegar solution, leaving at least 1/2-inch headspace. Adjust lids and process according to the recommendations in Table 1.
Table 1. Recommended processing time for Marinated Whole Mushrooms in a boiling-water canner.
Style of Pack: Hot
Jar Size: Half-pints
Process Time (at altitudes):
0 - 1,000 ft: 20 minutes
1,001 - 3,000 ft: 25 minutes
3,001 - 6,000 ft: 30 minutes
Above 6,000 ft: 35 minutes.
